text: Large volumes of carbon dioxide are safe and effective for fighting fires in enclosed spaces, such as in a pumproom, provided that the:

options.text: ventilation system is secured and all persons leave the space
persons in the space wear damp cloths over their mouths and nostrils
persons in the space wear gas masks

explanation: For effective CO2 fire suppression in enclosed spaces like pumprooms, the ventilation system must be secured to maintain the required concentration of CO2. This also necessitates ensuring all personnel have evacuated the space prior to discharge.
